pharmacopedia-desc: Voting, structured effects, and discussion widgets for Pharmacopedia
pharmacopedia-login-required: Log in and set up two-factor authentication to save your input. Without an account this page only previews your selection — your click is shown locally but not persisted.
pharmacopedia-effect-failed: Effect report could not be saved.
pharmacopedia-comment-too-long: Comment is too long (5000 char max).
pharmacopedia-edit-failed: Could not edit (not yours, or already removed).
pharmacopedia-delete-failed: Could not delete (not yours, or already removed).
right-pharmacopedia-literature-upload: Upload PDF files with literature submissions
feature-requests-summary: Submit and discuss feature requests for Pharmacopedia.
request-review-summary: Sysop console for triaging feature requests.
pharmacopedia-fr-submit: Submit and discuss feature requests for Pharmacopedia
pharmacopedia-fr-review: Triage feature requests (status, priority, sysop notes, replies)
echo-pref-tooltip-pharmacopedia-fr: Notify me when one of my feature requests changes status.
pharmacopedia-no-profile: No profile found for this user.
myShareLog: Who has viewed my shared content
special-mysharelog: Who has viewed my shared content
